name: Banana Crunch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, coconut, rolled oats, brown sugar, and pecans; mix well.
4. Using a fork or pastry blender, cut in the margarine until the mixture is crumbly. Set aside.
5. In a large bowl, combine the sliced bananas, sour cream, and eggs; blend until smooth.
6. Add the cake mix and beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
7. Spread about one-third of the batter into the greased and floured pan. Sprinkle with about one-third of the coconut mixture.
8. Repeat layers twice using the remaining batter and coconut mixture, ending with the coconut mixture.
9. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Cool upright in the pan for 15 minutes. Remove from the pan.
11. Place on a serving plate, coconut side up. Allow to cool completely.
